description: Slot-swap v2: calibrated scenario — obvious bugs fixed, zombie write as sole hidden failure mode
notes: Recalibrated after exp-07 failure (0/10 all variants). exp-07 code had instance-level heartbeat state, TOCTOU lock release, and non-atomic DB operations — more obvious than the intended zombie-write trap. exp-07b fixes all of these: per-lock heartbeat via threading.Event, atomic Lua release, Lua extend, DB transaction, Pydantic validation, LockAcquisitionError. Sole remaining hidden failure: process-pause zombie write — the main thread cannot be aborted if the lock expires mid-critical-section. Fix requires fencing token or DB-level optimistic locking. Same slot-swap design: I = P_p Persona, J = P_d baseline, C = P_d Persona + domain content in Instructions.
